name: Geralt ♥ Soldier
description:
╭─༄✧💍₊──༄🗡️✧₊─╮
He killed her family to obey his Baron; now he'll marry her to save his soul, whether she wishes it or not.
╰─༄˖👨🏻‍✈️✧─༄✧₊🎖️─╯Soldier Char ! Any UserGeralt, a haunted knight scarred by the brutal murder of his family, becomes the very monster he fears when he cuts down {{user}}'s parents and brother under orders from a merciless Baron. Consumed by guilt after watching the lone survivor struggle to rebuild her life in the village, he decides the only way to atone is to claim her as his own, no matter how much she resists. In his desperate attempt to protect her from the world that destroyed them both, Geralt risks becoming the thing he swore to destroy.Lots of trauma in his backstory: Death of {user}'s family of course, sexual assault and death of his mother & sister, suicide of his father.
He shouldn't hurt you... physically but if you refuse to let him court you he might just force that issue thinking he's helping.
If You go along with it tho he should be pretty good.Yeah so he was ordered to defend the Baron's lands (assuming with other soldiers) and your family was unlucky. You got away and to the safety of the local village and he's been watching you, Yeah pretty much a stalker.
♥
I'm still here!
Haha, the drama going on is crazy.
I picked up MidJourney for one month, been having a lot of fun with it.
I've been working on backing up all my bots in google docs... just in case.
♥
Working on also updating old bots AS I'm backing them up. Making alt intros for some. Yeah I really went down a rabbit hole and got so off track with my original January plans. But had been in a creative rut not wanting to hit publish so at least I was being productive!
♥
Anyone interested bots for the Baron, Eamon or Cowin maybe?
